solutions.solution: According to the question, J > M, L > N > K ∴ J > M > L > N > K. So, shortest is K.
It cannot be established that which of the two poles B/D is taller but it is sure that either of B or D is the second tallest.
The colour of tallest pole is silver.
Here, H and T in the subcript denote heavier and taller. BH > AH and CH, CT > BT, AH > CH, CT > DT > AT, DH > BH, BT > DT. DH > BH > AH > CH. Here, D is the heaviest.
CT > BT > DT > AT. Here, C is the tallest.

Let age of Mahima = x, Then, age of Anita = 2x, Age of Rajan = x/2, Age of Deepti = 4x, Age of Lata = x/4. Now, we have the following arrangement in descending order: Deepti > Anita > Mahima > Rajan > Lata. Lata is youngest.
There are no two persons of the same age as per the given information.
Mahima's age = 16 yr ∴ Lata's age = 16/4 = 4 yr
According to the question, K > S > R, Madhav is the tallest, K > A > S. On arranging the above data, we get ∴ M > K > A > S > R or R < S < A < K < M. Hence, Shailendra will be the second.
Amit = Sumit, Sumit > Richa, Jyotsana > Richa > Saurabh, Jyotsana > Sumit. On arranging the above data, we get ∴ (Jyotsana) > Sumit = Amit > Richa > Saurabh. So, Jyotsana is eldest among them.
Let the age of Shyam = x yr, Then, age of Ram = 2x yr and age of Sohan = 4x yr ∴ 4x > 2x > x. On arranging the above data, we get ∴ Sohan > Ram > Shyam > Mohan. So, Sohan is the eldest.
Decreasing order (agewise) P > R > Q > S, Decreasing order (moneywise) R > S > P > Q
The data is inadequate because it is not given that who between Viral and Shikhar is taller. Hence, answer cannot be determined.
According to the question, Lakshmi > Meenu, Lakshmi > Leela > Meenu, Meenu > Hari > Latha. On arranging the above data, we get Lakshmi > Leela > Meenu > Hari > Latha. Hence, Latha is the youngest.
According to the question, S > R, R > G, P > S. On arranging the above data, we get (P) > S > R > G. So, Priya is the eldest.
According to the question, Sashi > Sunita (2 yr), Sunita > Bindu (3 yr), Shekhar > Bindu (1 yr) ∴ Sashi > Sunita > Shekhar > Bindu. So, youngest person in the group is Bindu.
